questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Same Number Multiplication and Same Number Subtraction Series
questions.body: Replace the question mark (?) in the series given below with the correct option. 4, 5, 7, 11, 19, 35, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Same Number Multiplication and Subtraction in Increasing Order Subtraction Series
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the following number series? 4, 7, 12, 21, 38, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Increasing Order Multiplication and Same Number Subtraction Series
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the following number series? 4, 6, 16, 62, 308, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Increasing Order Multiplication and Increasing Order Subtraction Series
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the following number series? 3, 5, 13, 49, 241, ?

solutions.solution: In the given series, Next element = (Previous element × 2 − 3). Pattern: 4×2-3=5, 5×2-3=7, 7×2-3=11, 11×2-3=19, 19×2-3=35, 35×2-3=67. Therefore ? = 67 [∵ A₁ = 2 and A₂ = 3]
In the given series, following pattern is used. Pattern: 4×2-1=7, 7×2-2=12, 12×2-3=21, 21×2-4=38, 38×2-5=71. Therefore ? = 71
In the given series, following pattern is used. Pattern: 4×2-2=6, 6×3-2=16, 16×4-2=62, 62×5-2=308, 308×6-2=1846. Therefore ? = 1846
In the given series, following pattern is used. Pattern: 3×2-1=5, 5×3-2=13, 13×4-3=49, 49×5-4=241, 241×6-5=1441. Therefore ? = 1441
